Task: [DECISION] Sprint scope: Option A (5 bundles) / Option B (2 writers) / Option C (3-bundle priority)
Notes: Gate: all Phase 3 production blocked until scope confirmed. Option A: 5 hrs/day Jun 22–Jul 9. Option C: recommended if June capacity uncertain.

Task: [DECISION] Goldenseal sourcing path: order live specimen OR confirm Wikimedia CC
Notes: Path 1: Prairie Moon or Strictly Medicinal order by Jun 8. Path 2 (recommended): email NC and Missouri Botanical Gardens. Zero cost and zero schedule risk.

Task: [DECISION] Palette finalization: confirm 6 hex codes or approve alternatives by June 15
Notes: Default hex codes documented and production-ready. Post-production palette change = 1.2 hrs rework per cover (5 covers = 6 hrs total rework).

Task: Props acquisition: kraft paper / mortar-pestle / glass jars / linen / wooden tray / reflector
Notes: Budget $60–100. Non-blocking — can compress to a single order by Jun 8 without impacting sprint.

Task: Seedling photography: Calendula / Red Clover / Lemon Balm / Thyme / Lavender starts
Dependencies: Props acquired; seeds started by May 15
Notes: Annual seeds germinate in 2–4 weeks. Very flexible window — seeds start in late May and plants are ready through mid-June.

Task: [HARD DEADLINE] Goldenseal + Black Cohosh order placed OR Wikimedia CC path confirmed
Notes: Goldenseal: Prairie Moon rhizome $35–50 or Strictly Medicinal. Black Cohosh: Strictly Medicinal $25–35. Expected arrival Jul 13–20. Zero-float deadline.

Task: Mature/flowering photography: Black Cohosh + Elderberry + Echinacea mature rosette
Notes: Shoot within 3 days of plant arrival. Most Tier 1–2 specimens arrive Jul 13–20 — these are pre-sprint shots of any early-arriving plants.

Task: [HARD DEADLINE] Elderberry order placed (Prairie Moon bare-root; local nursery potted backup)
Notes: Prairie Moon bare-root $30–45. Local nursery potted elderberry is valid contingency if Prairie Moon OOS — 2–3 week lead time from local nursery.

Task: Mountain Rose Herbs dried herbs ordered: all 12 active species (1 oz each; $80–120)
Notes: Frontier Co-op is emergency backup at 3–5 business day ship time. Must arrive by Jun 17 for studio session. Order by Jun 13 if uncertain about Mountain Rose lead time.

Task: [PALETTE DECISION DEADLINE] Confirm 6 hex codes for Phase 3 Medicinal palette
Notes: If undecided by Jun 15: default to production-ready hex codes in critical path doc. Must be decided before Jun 21 brand kit loading action.

Task: Dried herb studio session: mortar/pestle staging / glass jars / flat-lay by bundle theme
Notes: North-facing window 9am–2pm. No ring light. Bundle-specific backgrounds: linen (WH) / white board+elderberry (Resp) / dark wood (Imm) / grey muslin (Sleep) / kraft paper (Dgt).

Task: Photo editing: cull 100–150 raw to 50–60 keepers; warm preset; export 2400x2400px
Notes: Target: 8–12 studio images per bundle (40–60 total) + 3–5 hero/cover candidates per bundle (15–25 usable).

Task: Attribution logging: Wikimedia CC + iNaturalist sources for all pre-sprint sourced images
Notes: WORKLOG.md protocol: log species / source URL / license / filename before any image is used in a guide. Zero-float deadline.

Task: Canva brand kit: load Phase 3 Medicinal palette (6 hex codes) + pre-test one zone card
Notes: 15-minute action per canva-phase-3-adaptation-guide.md. No Brand Kit rebuild needed — palette is additive. Must complete before Sprint Day 1.

Task: WH: Front matter + Introduction + Black Cohosh (700w — conservation sidebar / cultivation / contraindications)
Notes: Black Cohosh conservation sidebar (150w) and Cherokee traditional use framing require accuracy review. Tier 3 plant orders placed same day.

Task: WH: Vitex (600w — invasive note for SE states) + Red Clover (400w — isoflavone framing)
Notes: Vitex invasive watch list (TN/NC) note is mandatory. Red Clover: phytoestrogenic isoflavone framing per FTC quick reference.

Task: WH: Calendula (400w) + Lavender (400w — 3 cultivars) + preparation methods + self-edit pass
Notes: ZERO FLOAT. WH writing must complete by Jun 28 EOD for Jun 29 upload. Pace self-test: if WH below 2,500w at EOD Jun 24, activate Option C.

Task: Women's Health cover design (Black Cohosh or Calendula hero; Deep Burgundy palette)
Dependencies: WH Day 1 complete; hero photo available
Notes: Parallel to WH writing Day 2. Design lock is July 3 — 4-day float from scheduled date.

Task: [CHECKPOINT] Writing pace self-test: if WH below 2,500w at EOD Jun 24 activate Option C
Notes: SCOPE TRIGGER. Option C: 3-bundle priority (WH / Resp / Sleep) — preserves Jun 29 / Jul 6–7 / Jul 13 upload dates regardless of scope selection.

Task: Resp: Introduction + Elderberry (800w — raw berry toxicity / sambunigrin / cultivar guide)
Notes: Elderberry is the most complex Respiratory species. Raw berry toxicity (sambunigrin) and cross-pollination cultivar note require accuracy.

Task: Respiratory cover design (Elderberry berry cluster hero; Sage Green palette)
Dependencies: WH Day 2 complete; hero photo available
Notes: Parallel to WH writing Day 3. Elderberry berry cluster has the widest CC-licensed selection of any species in Phase 3.

Task: Resp: Mullein (600w — biennial lifecycle / ear oil prep) + Echinacea two-species (600w — UpS sidebar)
Notes: E. angustifolia conservation sidebar is mandatory. Two-species comparison is primary content differentiation vs. PLR guides.

Task: Resp: Thyme (500w — thymol framing / pregnancy caution) + shared sections + WH final self-edit
Notes: Lighter day. WH self-edit pass is the final quality gate before PDF export. Resp writing can slip 1 day without affecting Jul 6–7 upload.

Task: Resp self-edit pass; WH PDF export QA (5MB limit / no placeholder / attribution confirm)
Dependencies: Resp writing and WH self-edit done
Notes: WH PDF must be export-ready by end of Day 7. Resp PDF targeted complete but can slip 1 day without affecting upload.

Task: Dried herb Immunity props studio batch
Notes: Mortar-and-pestle / glass jars / flat-lay Immunity bundle. Parallel to sprint writing — photography is secondary; writing has priority on constrained days.

Task: Studio edit and cull Days 1–3 photos: rate and select keepers; export 2400x2400px
Notes: Cull to 8–12 keepers per bundle. Export at 2400x2400px for Canva cover import.

Task: [MILESTONE 1] Women's Health uploaded to Etsy (9–10am ET)
Dependencies: WH PDF complete, all 5 image slots filled
Notes: REVENUE START — WH live at $22. 72-hr Etsy discovery window opens. Upload checklist: title <140 chars / 13 tags / 5 image slots / test download / practitioner 10-pack simultaneous ($120–130).

Task: Immunity: Introduction + Echinacea condensed (immunity framing; 60% of Resp length)
Notes: Echinacea second-occurrence. Immunity framing shifts from respiratory support to immune modulation.

Task: Immunity cover design (Goldenseal root or Ashwagandha hero; Deep Burgundy palette)
Dependencies: WH upload complete; hero photo available
Notes: Goldenseal root hero may require multiple sourcing attempts — highest revision risk cover in Phase 3.

Task: Immunity: Ashwagandha complete (900w — Rasayana context / withanolide framing / mandatory thyroid+pregnancy warning)
Notes: Ashwagandha thyroid/pregnancy warning is mandatory — omitting creates product liability. Longest single species section in Phase 3 (900w).

Task: Sleep cover design (Passionflower flower hero; Muted Lavender accent palette)
Dependencies: Immunity Day 1 complete; hero photo available
Notes: Passionflower Wikimedia CC flower image is the listing thumbnail species — visually superior to a poorly-lit fresh specimen.

Task: Immunity: Elderberry condensed (fermentation note; immunity framing) + Goldenseal intro + CITES sidebar (200w mandatory)
Notes: CITES sidebar is mandatory in Immunity bundle. Language: Goldenseal is listed in CITES Appendix II. This guide recommends cultivated sources only.

Task: Women's Health zone card (existing template; 4-field fill)
Notes: 4-field fill from existing Phase 2 zone card template. No structural redesign needed.

Task: Immunity: Goldenseal cultivation (200w) + FGV sourcing documentation + berberine framing + self-edit
Notes: Goldenseal section total ~900w. FGV sourcing: cite UpS FGV participant directory URL. Berberine framing: contains berberine, an alkaloid studied in vitro and clinical settings.

Task: Respiratory zone card
Notes: 4-field fill. Elderberry berry cluster thumbnail visible in zone card header.

Task: [CHECKPOINT 1] Green: WH live on Etsy + Resp complete + Immunity writing started + 2 of 5 covers done
Notes: If WH not uploaded by Jun 30 EOD: activate date-slip path (WH Jul 3 / Resp Jul 10 / Sleep Jul 17) — no scope reduction required.

Task: Sleep: Introduction + Valerian complete (800w — second-year root harvest / valerenic acid / drug interaction with sedatives)
Notes: Valerian sedative drug interaction warning is mandatory. Second-year root harvest detail is primary differentiation for practitioner buyers.

Task: Digestive cover design (Dandelion root or Ginger rhizome hero; Sage Green palette) — DESIGN LOCK EOD
Notes: DESIGN LOCK EOD July 3. Zero float. After this date no design changes until after launch. Final cover in production sequence.

Task: Sleep: Passionflower complete (700w — maypop forager crossover / trellis requirements / MAOI interaction note)
Notes: MAOI interaction note is mandatory. Passionflower is the listing thumbnail species — CC flower image is visually superior to a fresh specimen.

Task: Sleep: Lemon Balm condensed (nervine framing / TSH caution) + Lavender condensed (linalool / sleep sachet) + shared sections + self-edit
Notes: Lemon Balm TSH warning is mandatory. Lavender second-occurrence foregrounds aromatherapy and sleep sachet — Women's Health occurrence covers topical salve.

Task: [MILESTONE 2] Respiratory uploaded to Etsy (9–10am ET)
Dependencies: Resp PDF complete, all 5 image slots filled
Notes: REVENUE START — Resp live at $20. 72-hr discovery window. 7 days after WH upload maximizes algorithmic separation.

Task: Digestive: Introduction + Dandelion complete (900w — bitters / wild-edibles cross-sell hook / roasted root coffee substitute)
Notes: Dandelion section (900w) is the most strategically important content in Phase 3 — cross-sell hook from the wild-edibles forager cohort. Wild-edibles cross-sell note is the highest-leverage sentence in the guide.

Task: Immunity + Digestive zone cards (0.8 hr each)
Notes: 4-field fill each. Parallel to Digestive writing track — design is secondary on constrained days.

Task: Digestive: Calendula condensed (digestive framing — tea not oil) + Lemon Balm condensed (carminative framing) + shared sections
Notes: Calendula digestive framing vs. WH: this occurrence covers internal infusion and GI use; WH covers topical salve.

Task: Sleep zone card
Notes: 4-field fill. Passionflower flower thumbnail visible in zone card header.

Task: Consistency review + export test all 5 covers
Dependencies: All covers done; design lock active
Notes: Verify thumbnail crop at 170x135px (Etsy preview size). Verify no placeholder text. Confirm all images attributed in sources section.

Task: [CHECKPOINT 2] Green: Resp live + Immunity + Sleep writing complete + Digestive at 1,500+ words + all 5 covers complete
Notes: If Sleep not complete at Jul 7: Sleep upload shifts from Jul 13 to Jul 16 (3-day slip; no cascade). If Digestive below 1,500w: Aug 3 upload shifts to Aug 10.

Task: Digestive: Ginger complete (700w — grocery store rhizome warning / gingerol+shogaol framing / nausea RCT evidence) + Digestive self-edit
Notes: Ginger nausea RCT evidence base is strongest of any species in Phase 3. Frame: multiple RCTs studied for nausea associated with pregnancy, chemotherapy, and postoperative recovery.

Task: FTC language compliance review: all 5 bundles (efficacy claims / contraindications / qualifying language / mandatory warnings)
Notes: Priority order: Women's Health (Black Cohosh / Vitex) → Immunity (Goldenseal CITES / Ashwagandha thyroid+pregnancy) → Sleep (sedative interactions) → Respiratory → Digestive.

Task: SEO optimization pass: Etsy title/tag keyword density verification; PDF export all 5 bundles
Notes: Etsy title: primary keyword in first 40 characters / under 140 total. Tags: 13 tags each under 20 characters. PDF: under 5MB / no placeholders / attribution complete.

Task: Sleep upload staging; file naming convention for all 5 bundles; practitioner variant staging
Notes: Practitioner 10-pack price: $120–130. Practitioners are the highest-LTV segment across all 5 bundles.

Task: FLOAT DAY 1 — absorb writing overrun from any Week 3 day OR begin Sleep upload staging early
Notes: 8 hours available. If Days 15–19 on schedule: use for Sleep upload staging and practitioner variant QA.

Task: [MILESTONE 3] Sleep uploaded to Etsy (9–10am ET); sprint retrospective; WORKLOG.md final update
Dependencies: Sleep PDF complete, all 5 image slots filled
Notes: SPRINT COMPLETION. Sprint definition: WH + Resp + Sleep live. Immunity and Digestive staged for Jul 20 and Aug 3.

Task: [CHECKPOINT 3 — SPRINT CLOSE] Confirm: WH + Resp + Sleep live / Immunity staged Jul 20 / Digestive staged Aug 3
Notes: Sprint is NOT complete if PDFs are not ready. All 5 PDFs must be export-ready regardless of upload date.

Task: [MILESTONE 4] Immunity uploaded to Etsy (9–10am ET)
Notes: REVENUE START — Immunity live at $22. Review accumulation for Nov–Dec cold/flu gifting window begins. 7-day spacing from Sleep upload.

Task: [MILESTONE 5] Digestive uploaded to Etsy (9–10am ET); forager cohort cross-sell email trigger
Notes: FULL LAUNCH COMPLETE. 14-day gap from Immunity maximizes algorithmic separation. Kit email trigger: FORAGER20 segment receives dandelion cross-sell on Aug 3.

Task: [CONTINGENCY 1] Option C activation: 3-bundle scope if WH below 2,500w on Day 3
Notes: Activate if WH < 2,500w EOD Jun 24. Complete WH + Resp Week 1 / move Sleep to Week 2 / defer Imm + Dgt to late July. Immunity shifts Aug 3; Digestive shifts Aug 17.

Task: [CONTINGENCY 2] Goldenseal CC photo path: email NC Botanical Garden + Missouri Botanical Garden
Notes: Trigger: no order confirmation by Jun 7 EOD. Zero cost / zero schedule risk. Wikimedia Commons CC-BY-SA Goldenseal coverage confirmed sufficient for launch quality.

Task: [CONTINGENCY 3] Upload stagger instead of compressing writing: shift Immunity to Jul 27 / Digestive to Aug 10
Notes: Trigger: Immunity not complete by Jul 5 EOD. Sleep remains Jul 13. Sprint writing extends to Jul 15 (2 calendar days beyond nominal end). Revenue impact: negligible.

Task: [CONTINGENCY 4] Google Docs PDF fallback: if any single cover design exceeds 2 hours on first attempt
Notes: Create Google Docs template with header image placeholder / bundle title / zone indicator. Export as PDF for launch. Canva version becomes v1.1 design upgrade post-launch.

Task: [CONTINGENCY 5] Minimum viable launch: if fewer than 3 bundles written and export-ready at Day 18
Notes: Priority: WH → Sleep → Resp. Upload whichever 2–3 bundles ready by Jul 13. Defer remaining to Aug–Sep.
